feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to Setup a Rebate Threshold limit in Contract condition Record
entry.content: Requirement - in SAP S/4 Hana, Rebates can only give 1000$ threshold value, and there will not be any more rebates applicable. How can this achievable. Please help!!

entry.title: Unable to Fetch Distinct Values using For loop and Cursor in SAP HANA.
entry.content:
I am trying to fetch Distinct values into the For loop in SAP HANA using CURSOR and For Loop and I am not getting all the distinct values into the For Loop. Instead of getting 10 distinct names, I am getting only 5 names in my output. Could you please guide me with the correct SQL?

CREATE PROCEDURE DBADMIN.FetchDistinctStrings()
LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
AS
BEGIN
        DECLARE STRING1 VARCHAR(255);
        DECLARE CURSOR MyTenIDFetch (STRING1 VARCHAR(255)) FOR
        SELECT DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_NAMES FROM "H_CPO_MAIN"."TABLE_NURO";
        OPEN MyTenIDFetch(:STRING1);
        FETCH MyTenIDFetch INTO STRING1;
        FOR CUR_ROW AS MyTenIDFetch(STRING1) DO
        SELECT STRING1 as STRING_NAMES FROM DUMMY;
        END FOR;
    CLOSE MyTenIDFetch;
END;

entry.title: Need to verify IP address configured for replication
entry.content:
Need to verify the IP address used for replication of SAP HANA DB

entry.title: Change the idtype from 04 to 00 or 01 without the address number
entry.content:
Hai all,

Scenario, User is not having any address number in usr21 and with idtype 04. Is there any report program to change the idtype to 00 or 04 without the address number. I tried to maintain the address number, but it is not possible for idtype 04. If any advice or solution is helpful. 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA 2022 Application and HANA DB supported on RHEL 9.2
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a SAP S/4 HANA 2022 system (Application - Kernel 789_REL Patch 200and PERSON_NAME DB 2.0 SP7 Rev 072) installed on RHEL 9.0. Our OS team is planning to upgrade RHEL to 9.2. Please advise if SAP S/4 HANA 2022 system (Application - Kernel 789_REL Patch 200 and HANA DB 2.0 SP7 Rev 072) is supported on RHEL 9.2.

Thanks and Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Advance Intercompany sales Purchase order Posting Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,
 
i have a Question here on advance intercompany where my scenario is below.
 
Selling company / sales org / Plant = BMBL
Delivering company/Sales org/ plant = BMGW
 
Scenario created:1
 
So in transit level i have mapped to company code BMDE Selling code - BMDE = BMBL (Plant)
So in transit level i have mapped to company code BMGB Delivering code - BMGB = BMGW (Plant)
 
here my Question when have intercompany scenario needed to be activated for different plant in Company code BMDE & BMGB then you cannot maintain other plants here in config Level V_T001_TRNSTPLNT then how come this functionality can be adopted for other plants in S4 Hana for the company codes mentioned.
 
scenario created: 2
 
Company code Sales or selling plant Delivering plant
BMDE BMBV BMBV DE
BMGB BMHM BMHM GB
 
Transit plant BMBV
 
But my test case shows wrong where it is showing wrong Transit plant which should not be BMBL in scenario 2 but it is coming from Config. V_T001_TRNSTPLNT.
 
But here my Question when we have multiple transit plants in one single company code then how this process can be adopted in advance intercompany process.
 
can you please help some info on  this thank you.

entry.title: Hana Backup deletion option for native backups solution
entry.content:
are taking backups on local disk for some time , here backups are loading to that location and not deleting any of the backups. Is there any option to delete those backup files ? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PROJECT ON SAP S4HANA MM
entry.content: Hello guys, Hope you all doing great. I am doing UG in computer science and businees systems engineering in KNOWLEGE INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY Salem,Tamilnadu,India. I am looking for some project idea in SAP MM, S4 Hana procuring and sourcing. I really want to show some improvement or enhancement in the SAP system some part of supply chain. Although SAP MM. And I don't know where to start or what to do . please suggest a way to start and complete my project on SAP S4HANA MM.

entry.title: absolete problem
entry.content:
mb01 is absolete problem. what is this?
I dont have any idea about this..

entry.title: HANA Scale our Server Size
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently in the process of migrating our on-premise SAP PERSON_NAME, which consists of 3 nodes, to the Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Our existing on-premise server is configured as follows:

  • Master Node: 228 CPUs
  • Worker Node 1: 228 CPUs
  • Worker Node 2: 228 CPUs

In order to match the SAPS requirements, we are considering the following configuration for our servers on GCP:

  • Master Node: 416 CPUs
  • Worker Node 1: 208 CPUs
  • Worker Node 2: 208 CPUs

We are seeking suggestions if it is advisable to configure different nodes with varying sizes. We also wish to understand if this approach would impose any limitations.

Please do not hesitate to request any additional information you may need from us to provide your expert advice.

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BOM indicator
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to solve a problem and I'm not sure how:

I have a lsit of materials and I need to know:

- if a material has a BOM

-if a material is part of a BOM

How can I do this with standard transaction? Do we have an indicator in MM03 transaction?

For sure, I need in mass, because I have 17.000 materials to explore :).

Thank you.

 

I'm afraid that the answer is that there is not an BOM indicator at all 😞

entry.title: How to disable adding Delivery without base doc (Sales Order)?
entry.content: I am a superuser withing SAL Version 10.0 - Database:HANA. How do I disable the option to add Delivery with no Base Document? ie:Delivery Block

entry.title: Change log for user assignments in HANA DB
entry.content:
we have a request ,to extract the User roles assignements for certain time period in HANADB(ECP HANADB).
for instance,
 
users provisioned and de-provisioned during the period 01 April 2023 to till date to the below roles in HANA DB.

- AUDIT_ADMIN
- PUBLIC

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Certificate which I am looking forward to complete is not available on SAP now
entry.content:
Below certificates are no longer available on SAP, please suggest if any new version or alternate ?

 

 

C_SECAUTH_20 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP System Security and Authorizations Certification (18271)

C_SM100_7210 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP Solution Manager, Mandatory and Managed System Configuration (7.2 SPS10) Certification (18270)

C_TADM70_21 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52 Certification (16827)

C_TADM_22 - SAP Certified Technology Consultant - SAP S/4HANA System Administration Certification (20641)

C_TADM70_22 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52 Certification (21312)

entry.title: i am doing 101k while posting GR got an error pir not found in p.org
entry.content:
I am doing 101k while posting GR got an error Purchasing info record was not found in the purchasing organization. but in the p.o, I use a different p.org, not the one show in error

Please help here

entry.title: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi,

After an Upgrade with HANA 2022 some ATP Customizing Functions disappeared and i do not know where to find them. In older HANA Version you had the possibility to tick following options in this customizing step:

Sales- Basic Functions- Availability Check- Availability Check with ATP- Define Availability Check Group 

1. Total Sales

2. Total Deliver Reqs

3. Block with TrO Qties

4. no Pac.

5. Accumul.

6. RelChkPlan

Last 3 options can be found in the new (2022) customizing step Define Basic Availability Check Group Behavior but i cannot find customizing step for the first 3 options, they disappeared.

In the table TMVF are maintained- SM30 did not help.

entry.title: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content:
Hello.

After I execute Local Client Copy with SCCLN by Profile SAP_UCSV, can I delete the Source Client with SCC5N?

The Source Client is 100 and the Target Client is 200.

Because I only need 200 Client. (do not need the application data in 100)

Or is it better to simply lock 100 client (just in case)?

Thank you for all.

entry.title: SAP HANA on IBM POWER
entry.content:
I just wanted to drop a quick note about something special I am hosting on the 18th of April.

IBM is diving into how SAP HANA on IBM Power can be a game-changer for your business.

April 18th at 10:30 am CET

https://ibm.biz/SAP_on_Power
